name: Marla Gibbs' Carrot Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, beat the raw sugar and eggs thoroughly.
2. Mix in the vegetable oil.
3. Stir together the flour, cinnamon, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
4. Add to the egg mixture, beating until just combined.
5. Stir in the carrots, pineapple, and pecan. Spread evenly into 2 greased and waxed paper-lined 9-inch round cake pans.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 35-40 minutes or until the cake pulls slightly away from the edge of the pan.
7. Cool in pans for 10 minutes, then remove cakes and cool on wire racks.
8. In a large mixing bowl, beat together the cream cheese, butter, and vanilla until light and fluffy.
9. Gradually add powdered sugar. Beat until smooth.
10. Spread frosting over one layer of cake.
11. Place second layer on top and spread with remaining frosting.
